message: fix: quote curl format string to satisfy shellcheck

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 # Generated by scripts/update_checksums.sh
-7853ccce59f37b9316faf974df7225600b7125996812cb85686858c2031b3ff9  install.sh
+7858b92b0cc50746ba0f453a6e90e753333e172c77c0ed7d5375aa6e3505057f  install.sh
 eb54249d389c47a9fe670b879904c91d284f3d332f58d6828d7b3bb2749f5b52  verify.sh

@@ -1166,7 +1166,7 @@ EOF
         # 0.5) If ref is 'main', try to resolve 'latest' release tag for binary download
         if [ "$build_ref" = "main" ] && command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
             local latest_url
-            latest_url=$(curl -Ls -o /dev/null -w %{url_effective} "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/system_resource_protection_script/releases/latest")
+            latest_url=$(curl -Ls -o /dev/null -w '%{url_effective}' "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/system_resource_protection_script/releases/latest")
             if [[ "$latest_url" =~ /releases/tag/(.*)$ ]]; then
                 local resolved_tag="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
                 print_info "Resolved 'main' to latest release: $resolved_tag"
